creator: mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
This was addressed upstream via this PR:

https://github.com/grehan-freebsd/grub2-bhyve/commit/a2a1a8f716a00a8f42b36a8b91ac5b3e2328d39c

And added to the sysutils/grub2-bhyve port via this change:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/906b07ca0bb9f7b83be91f619cd92b7f898b8b43
